summary: Phase transitions should become replayable and replyable artifacts rather than journal-only or mode-capture side effects.
`TransitionArtifact` evidence should preserve both `spectral_entropy` and `density_gradient` so thickening/syrup texture is not flattened into mode labels.
Any behavior unlock, pressure/local-control adjustment, or transition-sensitive tool availability remains live-control authority and needs a complete V2 lifecycle before execution.
